title: screening.completed payload (v1)
description: Emitted when the candidate-screener finishes a screening. Producer: screening-service (apps/screening-service/src/workers/screening.worker.ts). The REAL payload extends the typed ScreeningCompletedPayloadSchema with an OPTIONAL `agentic` block that is present only on the agentic (ReAct) path and absent on the single-shot fallback.
x-consumers: job-service apply-ingest-subscriber (advance accept-fast ledger row to SCREENED, any PASS/REVIEW/FAIL result)

score.description: Calibrated match score 0-100 (null only if no findings produced a score).

agentic.description: Present ONLY on the agentic ReAct path (AGENTIC_SCREENER != 0). Absent on the single-shot fallback. Surfaced for the AI-ops UI; no consumer currently reads it off the event.

requirementFindings.description: Per-requirement met/priority findings used to recompute the calibrated score.
